files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "openfga-2422-getting-deadline-exceeded-response-and-running-out-of-db-conns",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "openfga: Getting deadline_exceeded response and running out of db conns",
+    "description": "Getting deadline_exceeded response and running out of db conns. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify openfga troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your openfga deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga -n openfga --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review openfga configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant openfga configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga\nkubectl get configmap -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openfga\n```\nWe've run into a problem where all fga requests fail with deadline_exceeded error response, including even the health check!\n\nWe've done some experimentation and we've found the folllowing:\n\n- When this happens the database connections are consumed"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Getting deadline_exceeded response and running out of db…",
+        "description": "1. Fix cases where Iterators were not being cleaned up (thus not releasing connections or triggering the iterator cache etc) via abstraction (and missing explicit calls).\n2. Move SQL that yielded iterators to async. Otherwise, if you need to create 100 iterators, but can only process 5 at the same\n```yaml\n{\"code\":\"deadline_exceeded\",\"message\":\"Request Deadline Exceeded\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Getting deadline_exceeded response and running… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga -n openfga --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n openfga --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "1. Fix cases where Iterators were not being cleaned up (thus not releasing connections or triggering the iterator cache etc) via abstraction (and missing explicit calls).\n2. Move SQL that yielded iterators to async.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\"code\":\"deadline_exceeded\",\"message\":\"Request Deadline Exceeded\"}",
+        "openfga:\n    depends_on:\n      - openfga-migrate\n    image: openfga/openfga:v1.8.11\n    extra_hosts:\n      - \"host.docker.internal:host-gateway\"\n    command: run\n    ports:\n      - \"48080:8080\"\n      - \"48081:8081\"\n      - \"13000:3000\"\n    environment:\n      - OPENFGA_DATASTORE_ENGINE=postgres\n      - OPENFGA_DATASTORE_URI=postgres://openfga:openfga@${DB_ADDRESS}:5432/openfga\n      - OPENFGA_LOG_FORMAT=json\n      - OPENFGA_PLAYGROUND_PORT=13000\n      - OPENFGA_LOG_LEVEL=debug",
+        "maxOpenConns: 250\nmaxIdleConns: 100"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "openfga",
+      "incubating",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "openfga"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+    ],

+  },
